required_operator_inputs: start from clean master cf9754e and branch codex/sdf-pack-scene-lane-shell
add normal dropdown lane sdf_pack_scene backed by the authored SDF pack field producer
ship sdf_smooth_lattice_2d as the first built-in/default pack using only shipped SDF pack ops
expose period, radius, smooth_blend, rotation, offset_x, and offset_y through normal left-panel/no-mouse seams
preserve Color Pipeline coloring, capture/replay authority, reporting, and bounded performance proof for the lane
record mini-sprint planning workflow formalization as deferred workflow debt only
forbidden_operator_prompts: add recursive folds, apollonian fields, inversion, polar repeat, skew, anisotropy, or new pack ops in this slice
add arbitrary user pack catalog or authoring UX
replace the authored SDF pack parser or field producer with a bespoke renderer monolith
change AGENTS.md, hook policy, or workflow tools for mini-sprint planning
required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_schema --log artifacts/logs/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_schema.log --out-json artifacts/validation/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_schema.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- cmd /c ui_app\build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_ui_schema

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_binding --log artifacts/logs/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_binding.log --out-json artifacts/validation/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_binding.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- cmd /c ui_app\build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_schema_binding

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_pack --log artifacts/logs/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_pack.log --out-json artifacts/validation/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_pack.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- cmd /c ui_app\build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_sdf_pack test_sdf_pack_field_producer test_sdf_pack_field_producer_cuda

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_state_report --log artifacts/logs/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_state_report.log --out-json artifacts/validation/sdf_pack_scene_lane_shell_native_state_report.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- cmd /c ui_app\build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_diagnostics_state_io test_viewer_ui_automation_report
